consistency.notes: Level 1 spells, common for Cleric/Paladin spell lists.

quality.notes: All standard fields (slug, name, level, school, casting_time, range, components, duration, classes, description) are present and well-formatted.

mechanics.effect_summary: Provides immediate detection (location and presence) of specific creature types (aberration, celestial, elemental, fey, fiend, undead) and magically consecrated/desecrated objects/places within a 30-foot radius. Detection penetrates most non-magical barriers with specified limitations.
mechanics.balance_assessment: Appropriate for a 1st-level spell. The concentration requirement limits its sustained use relative to other 1st-level options, and the 30-foot range is narrow, but the ability to pierce barriers and identify specific threats/locations is potent utility.
mechanics.interaction_notes: The specified barrier penetration values (1 ft stone, 1 in metal, 3 ft wood/dirt) are standard for Divination spells of this nature.

data_archivist_review.recommendation: No changes required. Data conforms to expected schema and mechanical standards.
